snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: ihtiyacım Var ( Live Versiyon ) - ACIOĞLU-AI  ( Offical Music  ) 2026
snippet.description:
🎤 İhtiyacım Var (Live Konser Versiyonu) – Sahnedeki en gerçek duygu, en çıplak haliyle…

Bu performans, bir şarkıdan çok daha fazlası.
Bu; özlemin, yalnızlığın ve içten gelen bir çağrının sahnedeki yansıması.

Canlı performansın büyüsüyle; vokalin duygusal yoğunluğu, enstrümanların organik akışı ve seyirciyle kurulan bağ bu şarkıyı bambaşka bir boyuta taşıyor.

🔥 Söz Beste : Mehmet ACIOĞLU 
Seslendirme: Ai

Seyirciler sessiz ama derinden bağlı…
Her söz, her nota kalbe dokunuyor.



💔 Hikaye: Bazen birine ihtiyacın vardır…
Ama o yoktur.
Ve o yokluk, insanın içine çöker.

📀 Şarkı Sözleri:

Bir rüzgâr esse dokunsa yüzüme
Belki sen sanırım, dönerim gözüme
Kırılmış kalbim hâlâ seni sorar
Bensiz yaşarsın ama ben yapamam

snippet.title: 007 First Light - Official Rules of Spycraft Trailer
snippet.description: Take a look at the Rules of Spycraft Trailer for 007 First Light, an upcoming third-person action-adventure game centered on the early years of James Bond, developed by IO Interactive. Get the rundown on all the tactics and strategies to deploy while on the field as the legendary 007. Blend in, prepare for the mission, and always be ready to improvise when the mission takes an unexpected turn. 007 First Light is launching on May 27 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with a release on Nintendo Switch 2 later in Summer 2026.

snippet.title: IN THE END — | Emotional Uplifting | Female Vocal Trance | Lumi Elara
snippet.description:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0Hg44Qjgwv4Bba35YtJbMC?si=9ec7e75d097e460c

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/even-when-youre-gone-single/1870002873

An uplifting female trance journey shaped by memory, distance, and emotion.
“In The End” explores the moment where everything once felt infinite… slowly fades into something you can’t hold onto anymore. Where love doesn’t break all at once — it slips away quietly.

Every melody feels like a memory, every drop like the release you’ve been holding back.

This extended version pulls you deeper into that feeling, with longer builds, wider atmospheres, and emotional releases that linger — made for late nights, empty roads, and moments when everything feels a little too real.

Let the sound stay with you…
in the end.

#intheend #upliftingtrance #trancemusic #femaletrance #melodictrance #emotionaltrance #luminight #edm2026 #extendedmix #trancefamily

Because if you can’t win on the pitch… there are always other ways to play.

snippet.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Teaser | Apple TV
snippet.description:
The truth will surface. Silo returns July 3 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_Silo

“Silo” is the story of the last ten thousand people on earth, their mile-deep home protecting them from the toxic and deadly world outside. However, no one knows when or why the silo was built and those who try to find out face fatal consequences. Ferguson stars as Juliette, an engineer who seeks answers about a loved one’s murder and tumbles onto a mystery that goes far deeper than she could have ever imagined, leading her to discover that if the lies don’t kill you, the truth will.

“Silo” is produced for Apple TV by Apple Studios. The series is executive produced by Yost, Michael Dinner, Nina Jack, Joanna Thapa, Ferguson, Morten Tyldum, Howey, Fred Golan, Rémi Aubuchon and AMC Studios.

🎙️ Lyrics: Journey - Don't Stop Believin'

[Verse 1]
Just a small-town girl, livin' in a lonely world
She took the midnight train goin' anywhere
Just a city boy, born and raised in South Detroit
He took the midnight train goin' anywhere

[Verse 2]
A singer in a smoky room
The smell of wine and cheap perfume
For a smile, they can share the night
It goes on and on and on and on

[Pre-Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Verse 3]
Workin' hard to get my fill
Everybody wants a thrill
Payin' anything to roll the dice
Just one more time

[Verse 4]
Some will win, some will lose
Some are born to sing the blues
Oh, the movie never ends
It goes on and on and on and on

[Pre-Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Guitar Solo]

[Chorus]
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlights, people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on
Streetlights, people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlights, people

.........

Street Fighter (2026) ist ein Martial-Arts-Actionfilm von Kitao Sakurai mit Andrew Koji, Noah Centineo und Jason Momoa, der das bekannte Videospiel als großes Kino-Reboot neu interpretiert. Seht hier die Review.

INFOS ZUM FILM
Regie: Kitao Sakurai
Drehbuch: Kitao Sakurai, T. J. Fixman
Besetzung:
Andrew Koji, Noah Centineo, Callina Liang, Jason Momoa, David Dastmalchian, Roman Reigns, 50 Cent, Cody Rhodes

Ryu und Ken werden von Chun-Li für das legendäre „World Warrior“-Turnier rekrutiert, bei dem sich die stärksten Kämpfer der Welt gegenüberstehen. Doch hinter dem Wettbewerb verbirgt sich eine größere Verschwörung rund um den machthungrigen M. Bison, die die Kämpfer zwingt, sich nicht nur gegenseitig, sondern auch ihren eigenen Dämonen zu stellen.

snippet.title: CLAYFACE – Teaser Deutsch German (2026)
snippet.description:
► Warner Bros. präsentiert den #Teaser zu CLAYFACE ► #ClayfaceMovie– ab 22. Oktober 2026 nur im Kino! Abonniere den WARNER BROS. DE Kanal für aktuelle Kinotrailer. ► https://bit.ly/WarnerAbonnieren

Sieh der Angst ins Gesicht. #Clayface – ab 22. Oktober nur im Kino.

Mit „Clayface“ widmet sich DC Studios zum ersten Mal dem Genre des Horrorthrillers. Der von James Watkins inszenierte Film präsentiert Tom Rhys Harries in der titelgebenden Rolle des Bösewichts aus Gotham City.

„Clayface“ schildert den erschütternden Niedergang eines Mannes vom aufstrebenden Hollywood-Star zum von Rachegelüsten getriebenen Monster. Die Geschichte erzählt vom Verlust der eigenen Identität und Menschlichkeit, von der zerstörerischen Kraft der Liebe und von der Schattenseite wissenschaftlichen Ehrgeizes.

Neben Tom Rhys Harries standen für „Clayface“ Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella und Eddie Marsan vor der Kamera. In weiteren Rollen sind Nancy Carroll und Joshua James zu sehen.

James Watkins führte Regie nach einem Drehbuch von Mike Flanagan und Hossein Amini, das auf einer Story von Flanagan basiert und Figuren aus dem DC-Universum aufgreift. Der Film wurde von Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn und Peter Safran produziert. Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo und Lars P. Winther übernahmen die ausführende Produktion.

In sein Kreativteam berief Regisseur Watkins Kameramann Rob Hardy, Produktionsdesigner James Price, Editor Jon Harris, Visual Effects Supervisor Angus Bickerton, Kostümdesigner Keith Madden und Casting Director Lucy Bevan.

DC Studios präsentiert gemeinsam mit Domain Entertainment eine Produktion von 6th & Idaho: „Clayface“ von John Watkins. Den Vertrieb übernimmt Warner Bros. Pictures. Der Film startet in Deutschland am 22. Oktober 2026 exklusiv im Kino.

localized.description:
► Warner Bros. präsentiert den #Teaser zu CLAYFACE ► #ClayfaceMovie– ab 22. Oktober 2026 nur im Kino! Abonniere den WARNER BROS. DE Kanal für aktuelle Kinotrailer. ► https://bit.ly/WarnerAbonnieren

Sieh der Angst ins Gesicht. #Clayface – ab 22. Oktober nur im Kino.

Mit „Clayface“ widmet sich DC Studios zum ersten Mal dem Genre des Horrorthrillers. Der von James Watkins inszenierte Film präsentiert Tom Rhys Harries in der titelgebenden Rolle des Bösewichts aus Gotham City.

„Clayface“ schildert den erschütternden Niedergang eines Mannes vom aufstrebenden Hollywood-Star zum von Rachegelüsten getriebenen Monster. Die Geschichte erzählt vom Verlust der eigenen Identität und Menschlichkeit, von der zerstörerischen Kraft der Liebe und von der Schattenseite wissenschaftlichen Ehrgeizes.

Neben Tom Rhys Harries standen für „Clayface“ Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella und Eddie Marsan vor der Kamera. In weiteren Rollen sind Nancy Carroll und Joshua James zu sehen.

James Watkins führte Regie nach einem Drehbuch von Mike Flanagan und Hossein Amini, das auf einer Story von Flanagan basiert und Figuren aus dem DC-Universum aufgreift. Der Film wurde von Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn und Peter Safran produziert. Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo und Lars P. Winther übernahmen die ausführende Produktion.

In sein Kreativteam berief Regisseur Watkins Kameramann Rob Hardy, Produktionsdesigner James Price, Editor Jon Harris, Visual Effects Supervisor Angus Bickerton, Kostümdesigner Keith Madden und Casting Director Lucy Bevan.

DC Studios präsentiert gemeinsam mit Domain Entertainment eine Produktion von 6th & Idaho: „Clayface“ von John Watkins. Den Vertrieb übernimmt Warner Bros. Pictures. Der Film startet in Deutschland am 22. Oktober 2026 exklusiv im Kino.
